title: Cuneiform Tablet #0052: Old Assyrian Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
